Tile: Castle Area - Mario & Luigi Superstar Saga

Function.Inference: Introductory chordal vamp establishing the rhythmic groove.
Main looping body that ends with a repeat sign back to the melody.

Section.Inference: Introductory vamp without a main melody.
Introduces the primary melody over the established groove.
